title: Launch a Goroutine
instruction: Start a goroutine that prints "from goroutine". Sleep 100ms in main so it runs.

title: WaitGroup
instruction: Launch 3 goroutines (worker 1, 2, 3), use WaitGroup to wait for all.
hint:
wg.Add(1); go func(n int) { defer wg.Done(); fmt.Printf("worker %d
", n) }(i)

title: Channel Send and Receive
instruction: Create chan int, launch goroutine that sends 42, receive and print in main.

title: Buffered Channel
instruction: Create buffered channel size 3, send a b c, receive and print all three.
hint: ch <- "a"; ch <- "b"; ch <- "c"; then receive 3 times

title: Select Statement
instruction: Send on done from goroutine; use select to print "done" when it arrives.
